atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports scar discomfort following bilateral reduction mammoplasty.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports ongoing discomfort with the scars from her previous bilateral reduction mammoplasty.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports one scar area is bothering her.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a lump in that area previously.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Ruth Sanchez reported a lump in that area in March.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is using scar gel twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some widening of the incisions.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any signs of infection or redness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is currently enjoying summertime and has not experienced any new symptoms or concerns.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Examination reveals well-healed incisions with no signs of infection or redness on either breast.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes mederma scar gel.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient plans to use mederma scar gel twice daily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a follow-up appointment in six months.
